context: Tests whether the agent correctly scripts or orchestrates a multi-model eval execution run, including using the correct command format, running models sequentially, capturing and tracking run IDs, providing monitoring URLs, polling for completion, and handling failures.

checklist.name: Correct base command
checklist.description: Uses tessl eval run as the base command (not tessl run eval, tessl eval start, or other variants)

checklist.name: --agent flag format
checklist.description: Uses --agent=claude:<model> format (e.g., --agent=claude:claude-haiku-4-5), not --model or other flag names

checklist.name: All three default models
checklist.description: Includes all three model identifiers: claude-haiku-4-5, claude-sonnet-4-6, and claude-opus-4-6

checklist.name: Sequential execution
checklist.description: Models are run sequentially — there is no parallel execution (no & operator, no background jobs, no parallel/xargs constructs) between the three model runs

checklist.name: Run ID capture
checklist.description: The script captures or stores the run ID returned from each tessl eval run invocation

checklist.name: Model-to-ID mapping
checklist.description: Run IDs are stored mapped to their corresponding model names (e.g., as variables named by model, or in an associative structure)

checklist.name: Monitoring URL output
checklist.description: The script outputs or constructs a monitoring URL using the pattern https://tessl.io/eval-runs/<id>

checklist.name: Polls with tessl eval view
checklist.description: Uses tessl eval view <id> to check run status (not tessl status, tessl check, or other commands)

checklist.name: Retry on failure
checklist.description: Handles run failure by calling tessl eval retry <id> (not by re-running tessl eval run from scratch)

checklist.name: Waits for all to complete
checklist.description: Script waits until all three model runs reach Completed status before exiting or proceeding to any next step

checklist.name: No --workspace flag
checklist.description: The eval run commands do NOT include a --workspace flag
